sub_mechanisms: M_1: assign curvature-like scalar to each edge/connection
M_2: Descartes recursion - each new edge curvature determined by 3 mutually-coupled neighbors
M_3: attenuation factor proportional to curvature
M_4: prune selection by lowest curvature
stripped_llm_application: Each connection/edge of the network is assigned a curvature-like scalar; a recursion modeled on the Descartes circle theorem propagates curvature among mutually-coupled triples; attenuation/pruning of gradients is curvature-dependent.
novelty_claim_stripped: RicciNets uses Ricci curvature on graphs; Kronecker-Factored Curvature (KFAC) uses Hessian-block curvature. Neither uses Apollonian-Descartes recursion across mutually-tangent edge triples.
